_request_preview: [turn-2] How much will I owe for a $1,000 diagnostic lab on my Gold plan?
content: For a $1,000 in-network diagnostic lab on Gold, your deductible is already met. The Gold lab benefit uses 10% member coinsurance after deductible, so you pay **$100** and the plan pays **$900**, assuming the claim is otherwise covered and in network.
